title: SECTION 8 HOUSING PROGRAMS - 211info
text: SALEM HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about Section 8 housing in addition to fielding complaints about the program. 360 Church Street SE Salem, OR 973013707 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines, pass a criminal background check, and have at least one family member who is a citizen or lawful permanent resident of the US Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. Closed all major holidays. Email (503) 588-6368 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 588-6368 Main phone Main phone (503) 588-6368 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None for pre-application. Rent varies by unit, program, and income level. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Keizer and Salem (Marion County only) Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - PUBLIC HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM HOUSING AUTHORITY
